web_results.title: Democrats are planning to primary and oust Pennsylvania Sen. John Fetterman: report
web_results.description: It is also being speculated that Fetterman may run for president in 2028, but he has not confirmed if that is true.

web_results.title: Working Families Party plans 2028 Fetterman primary challenge - Axios Pittsburgh
web_results.description: Why it matters: The Working Families Party (WFP) announced Tuesday it is committing to support a primary challenger to Fetterman when his seat is up in 2028 due to growing frustrations with the Democratic senator's increasing support for President ...

web_results.title: 2028 United States Senate elections - Wikipedia
web_results.description: Five-term Democrat Ron Wyden was re-elected in 2022 with 55.8% of the vote. He is running for re-election. One-term Democrat John Fetterman was elected in 2022 with 51.2% of the vote.

web_results.title: Pennsylvania Democrats weigh 2028 primaries against John Fetterman
web_results.description: The intrigue: Fetterman has long held presidential ambitions, according to people who know him. Fetterman did not respond to a question about whether he would run for reelection to the Senate or president in 2028.

news_results.description: The early race is wide open · While no one has officially declared their candidacy just yet, the unofficial 2028 Democratic presidential field is taking shape — and it’s sprawling

news_results.title: Josh Shapiro’s presidential prospects and John Fetterman’s eye-popping numbers: Highlights from a new Pa. poll
news_results.description: John Fetterman has strong support with Republicans, but his numbers with his own party are underwater. Josh Shapiro has opened up a big lead in the race for governor.

news_results.title: Pete Buttigieg leads 2028 Democratic presidential poll in New Hampshire | Fox News
news_results.description: Pete Buttigieg leads a 2028 Democratic presidential poll in New Hampshire with 20% support, ahead of Gavin Newsom and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, who tied at 15%.

news_results.title: Newsom says 'fate' will decide if he faces off against Harris in 2028 presidential primary
news_results.description: Gov. Gavin Newsom remained vague about potentially facing former Vice President Kamala Harris in a 2028 Democratic primary, saying "fate will determine that."
